message:
feat(vector): add regression tests and perf benchmarks for vector index

xf-70: Vector index regression tests + perf validation

Tests added:
- test_load_from_file_truncated_header: Validates rejection of truncated headers
- test_load_from_file_version_mismatch: Validates rejection of unsupported versions
- test_load_from_file_truncated_record: Validates rejection of partial record data
- test_load_from_file_corrupted_offset_table: Validates rejection of corrupt offsets
- test_search_isomorphism_file_vs_storage: Proves file/storage produce identical results
- test_search_isomorphism_with_type_filter: Proves filtered searches are identical
- test_search_order_determinism: Proves search order is deterministic across runs

Benchmarks added:
- bench_vector_index_load_from_storage: Measures DB-based loading time
- bench_vector_index_load_from_file: Measures file-based loading time

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
